definition: value as specified by level (minTypmax) of the spot noise figure of a field-effect transistor at specified drain current, drain-source voltage, gate-source voltage, source impedance and frequency

definition_ml.en: value as specified by level (minTypmax) of the spot noise figure of a field-effect transistor at specified drain current, drain-source voltage, gate-source voltage, source impedance and frequency

remark: Spot noise figure: |Ratio of 1) the total output noise power per unit bandwidth (spectral density) at a single output frequency when the noise temperature of all input terminations is at the reference noise temperature T_no} at all frequencies that contribute to the output noise, to 2) that part of Item 1) caused by the noise of the signal-input termination at the signal-input frequency.

remark_ml.en: Spot noise figure: |Ratio of 1) the total output noise power per unit bandwidth (spectral density) at a single output frequency when the noise temperature of all input terminations is at the reference noise temperature T_no} at all frequencies that contribute to the output noise, to 2) that part of Item 1) caused by the noise of the signal-input termination at the signal-input frequency.
